since_last: 33% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.31%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.20% · BTC -5.37% · Gold -3.08% · Nasdaq100 -0.82%. 33% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.31%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.31%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.46%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at -7.14%
cards.body: Leaders: UPST +3.88%, ZBRA +3.52%, WDAY +3.42%, INTU +3.40%, PUBM +2.87%. Laggards: SMR -7.14%, OKLO -6.40%, OKLO -6.40%, INOD -5.84%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.96% at $154.62
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.96% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
